entry.title: Re: Vendor Consignment stock in transit
entry.content: Dear Jagdeep Thanks for the details given, Yes, There is no space requirement to keep the vendor consignment but still client wants to use it this Vendor consignment. Only requirment for them once 101K is happened they want to show Two Step Procedure for Consignment Process instead of 411 k mov type As the stock will move from vendor which will take 5 to 6 days in transit and Fi document should be triggered while doing GR at warehouse. BR Swetha.

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Data Cloud Screen-sets handling custom l...
entry.content:
Hi Rvanjari,

You can listen to the onAfterSubmit event and call gigya.accounts.getAccountInfo({callback: fn}) to retrieve user data.

The SDK handles authentication automatically, so there is no need to pass any parameters.

For a more robust approach, consider using gigya.accounts.addEventHandlers({onLogin: fn}), which triggers on any login action, regardless of the screen where it originated.

You can find more details here:
Handling Authentication Events – SAP Customer Data Cloud

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Sending eDocument Inbound Messages to Third Party non...

entry.title: Re: How to display an attribute of a class, which belongs...
entry.content: @ulrich_mhrke thank you for your replay.

entry.title: Re: How to display an attribute of a class, which belongs...
entry.content: @ulrich_mhrke, So how can I access the instance of the class (for instance attribute)?

entry.title: Successful First Online Meeting for SAP Community Vancouver!
entry.content:
We are thrilled to share that our first online meeting for the SAP Community Vancouver went smoothly and was a great success!

We had the pleasure of being joined by four enthusiastic members:

  • Moldir Abdikerim
  • Cherine Cañete Simbajon
  • Prabakaran Ganesan
  • Vellaikamban Balaji


The session kicked off with each of us introducing ourselves and sharing how SAP has become an integral part of our career journeys. It was inspiring to hear everyone’s unique experiences and the diverse ways SAP has impacted our professional lives.

We also took some time to get to know more about the SAP Community and the various resources and opportunities it offers.

The session concluded on a high note with a giveaway of two free e-book vouchers from SAP PRESS, adding an extra layer of excitement to our meeting.

A big thank you to everyone who participated and made this event memorable. We look forward to many more engaging and insightful sessions in the future!

Stay tuned for updates on our next meeting.

#SAPCommunity #Vancouver #Networking #CareerGrowth #SAPPRESS

entry.title: approval template did not affect some users
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of our client using SAP B1 version 9 having a problem with their approval. 

Approval condition is if the customers Sales Order is over their limit then the document will go through approval process. When logged in with marketing user, sales order document that over credit limit did not go through approval process. If i tried creating SO using manager account, the document successfully go through the approval process. 

Any settings or authorization that i need to check?

entry.title: How to export SAP Dynamic forms from one BTP Sub-account and import it to an another BTP sub-account
entry.content:
Hello community,

We have designed many Dynamic forms on one of our BTP sub-account and as part of the project execution we are now moving to another BTP sub-account. While I can export all of the forms successfully from the 'Forms Adminstration' page of my previous BTP sub-account, I could not import them in the new BTP sub-account as the 'Import' button is always disabled on the 'Forms Administration' page.

I could not find any relevant documentation that talks about importing the existing forms. Could you please let me know how it needs to be done?

 

 

Regards,

Madan

entry.title: Re: Send charges, surcharges and tax information to Ariba Business Network
entry.content:
Hi @gellper 

Thank you so much for sharing such a comprehensive article.

We are working on a similar requirement currently. Could you please also guide regarding the following queries:

1. Do we need to, first of all, extend the IDoc ARBCIG_ORDERS to include the segment E1EDP05 before performing the enhancement or just perform the enhancement directly within the mentioned user exit?

2. Our internal ABAP team performed the enhancement under the mentioned user exit - though it did not include the segment E1EDP05 in the IDoc. Are there any other steps/pre-requisites we might be missing?

Any insight from your end would be highly appreciated.

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: SAP Logon 750 crashes to desktop without errors after installing AMD drivers
entry.content: SCM is not the right place to post, but I've forwarded to the moderator to move it.

entry.title: Can SAP use different Foreign exchange rate at accounting document level?
entry.content:
I have monthly amounts for January - March for Income (EUR) and Expense (PLN). However I do quarterly billing in SAP in April. 

As per standard, SAP SD will calculate Expense/AP amount using April month exchange rate and create a single accounting document. i.e. Billing date exchange rate.

Is it somehow possible that SAP calculates the Expense/AP amount using monthly rates (I can provide month as a feed in upload template) and still create a single accounting document?

To summarize - can SAP use transaction period exchange rate instead of billing date exchange rate and still create single accounting document for the quarterly billing?

entry.title: Fiori Launchpad - Notification Configuration how to extend app
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have configured Notification app on Fiori Launchpad on S4 On premise. It works perfectly. I have 2 situations to handle.

1. We can configure actions. But how can we make it mandatory to enter a Reason for Rejection actions.

2. is it possible to enhance app on the frontend.  Lets say to add a dialog for Rejection actions. We may identify such action from action id. 

Any guidance on this topic is helpful.

Best Regards,

Pradeep

entry.title: Re: Unable to access Cloud Integration tenant APIs (like...
entry.content: When you create the instance of the Process Integration api plan you have you provide the configuration what authorizations this instance should get. Check out my example at integration-api-config.json. I've used this instance in the calls you find at integration-api.http.

entry.title: Payment Request Clearing Account
entry.content:
Dear Community,

in S/4 Public Cloud, when processing outgoing (supplier) payments, after successfully processed outgoing payment and processed bank statement I/we noticed postings towards account "Payment Request Clearing" which at the moment we cannot explain, meaning from where (in CBC customizing) is this particular account being triggered for our payment scenario - see attachment for details.

Scope Items for Basic Bank Account Management (BFA) and Basic Cash Operations (BFB) are being active.

Kindly advise.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: How to export SAP Dynamic forms from one BTP Sub-acco...
entry.content:
Hi Madan,

To enable import button, you need to assign Form Importer role under role collection in BTP.

Regards,

Rajesh

entry.title: Re: Issue getting DMS Folder Content in SAP Build Process...
entry.content:
You are getting 405 because you are missing "root" in the path. The underlying API for this activity (I believe) is:

https://{{endpoint}}/browser/{{repo}}/root/myfolder

I cannot see the full destination URL, but I assume it is not there. In any event, I would not put root in the destination but put it in the path of the activity, as then you can reuse the same destination for other purposes.

Also, this activity takes a path, not an object ID. When you said "folder ID" I assumed you meant objectID.

entry.title: Re: Benefits of Executing Stored Procedures via API in SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management
entry.content:
nice article, in that case, we can defined some custom entities like 

1. refresh reporting hierarchy 

2. retrieve transactional data by business unit.. 

called by external applications easily

entry.title: Handling CAP oData Error Code 413
entry.content:
Leveraging HANA DB subscriptions on SAP BTP alongside the CAP model is one of the most robust combinations for developing resilient applications. Consider a scenario where the Integration Suite fails to post data—whether it’s HR data or another document posting. In such cases, error details and the associated payload can be logged into tables on BTP. A front-end UI can then be quickly built to analyze these errors and re-trigger the process without any need for customization in S4. This scenario is likely familiar to many of you, as handling failures effectively is a common business challenge.

When posting data to the CAP model via oData V4, you might encounter error code 413, which signifies that the request payload is too large. While the fix has been implemented in the npm package "@sap/cds" version "^8.1" (so make sure to upgrade your npm), it is still important—considering both performance and scalability—to set a maximum limit on the payload size. Although the recommended size limit may vary depending on specific application requirements, the default value is generally suggested to help minimize DoS attack vectors. If only a single endpoint needs to handle larger payloads, it is best to configure that endpoint individually rather than applying a global change.

The most common risk with oversized payloads is the potential to exhaust the service’s memory, which can cause a crash. Therefore, a payload limit of 10 MB is often an optimal choice that meets most requirements. You can specify this limit directly in your service file with an annotation, like so:

 
annotate <CatalogService>.<Entity> with @cds.server.body_parser.limit: '10mb';

 Alternatively, you can set it in the project.json file as follows:

 

"server": { "body_parser": { "limit": "10mb" } }

 Personally, I prefer using the annotation method. I hope this information proves helpful, and I look forward to sharing more insights in future blogs.

entry.title: Re: How to export SAP Dynamic forms from one BTP Sub-acco...
entry.content: Thank you Rajesh 👍

entry.title: Re: 'Document Type' doesn't match for Crystal Report Layout

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning
entry.content:
@vijaykumar108 

There are couple of options you can use here.

  • Setting up Allocations https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/72233dce8086416189a936ceee1194ac.html
  • Advanced Formula Data Action where you code the logic explicitly 
  • Distribute Data using Data Disaggregation https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-enhancing-planning-with-additional-disaggregation-modes/ba-p/13591766

Advance Formula is the most flexible but the logic has to be written explicitly as per your requirement.

 

Hope this helps

Nikhil

entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have been using the Trial Tenants for over a month now. However, when I tried to open the tenant recently, I encountered the following error:

No Client with request id: sb-it-prov!t196

Authorization Request Error: The request for authorization was invalid.

Thanks,

Vinay Chonale

entry.title: Re: Where is the "follow user" option in the new Community?
entry.content:
Couldn't agree more... How can SAP expect a greater expert community without giving everyone a choice to follow those GOAT users? As a newbie, I want to follow updates from great users in this community. And GOATs need to be recognized and rewarded in the long term based on the growth of their followers.

In communities like GitHub, the number of followers is very helpful for one's career. But in SAP, this feature doesn't even exist...

This is really frustrating for me. It seems like SAP doesn’t care about this community, even though the users here work hard and have helped the practice of SAP A LOT.

entry.title: Equipment- Partner Function Update
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Is there any standard t-code available for mass update of partner function with partner no for a list of equipment ? I prepared one LSMW but it is not working . It is deleting previous partner function & partner no for each equipment . Supposing for equipment no 123 , I need to update partner function "PR" & partner no A, B, C . My LSMW is updating only C in equipment master & deleting previous partner no A, B . Can anyone please suggest .

Thanking you .

entry.title: Re: Totals calculation using scripting in SAP Analytics C...
entry.content:
@Sumalini 

I do not think scripting is the option here. You should try Subtotal or % subtotal for this.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/3b7c99a7a7cd4a29bb1c5132d91af341.html?q=subtotal

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: % Calculation in SAC Table
entry.content:
@Sumalini 

May be try using %subtotal or subtotal

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/3b7c99a7a7cd4a29bb1c5132d91af341.html?q=subtotal

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: AUTH - Allow Planners to change dimension attributes...
entry.content:
@adamnekola 

I think this would not be possible. The update on dimension is driven by update permission on dimension and once its assigned the user will always be able to edit the dimension explicitly by opening it. Its the same with model too, you need maintain rights to enter data but that also empowers you to delete facts from model data view.

Nikhil

entry.title: Best way of regular data download from S4HC to MS SQL Server or Azure server
entry.content:
We are in an implementation stage with ##S4HC Public Cloud and we have a BI system with the previous ERP, which we would like to continue feeding with data from SA

We need regular(daily/weekly) - preferably automated - data extractions of some data (eg. sales, production). The only way way we found so far is with using APIs. This does not seem to be a very efficient way for bigger volume data extraction (lot of overhead with json or xml data format vs. for example csv).

What would be the best way achieving this. We have MS SQL servers in house to store/transform data or at the worst case we can utilize an Azure Server.

Any help or pointers is much appreciated, Thx Attila

entry.title: Re: Employee Referral: End-to-end solution with SuccessFactors Recruiting, Onboarding and Employee C
entry.content:
Hi,

Did someone answer below questions?

Kind regards,

patrick

Hi,

I am configuring this integration but my IC does not filter well for the candidates referenced in Hired status. It also does not correctly extract the data in the Request Status field. Could you show the tree of the "Application Status Label" filter and the "Application Status" field? Right now it shows the Hired status but it is not the status found in the job requisition that was referenced. And I also see records where the candidate was never hired.

entry.title: Re: Understand DMS API – Free Postman Collection!!
entry.content:
Updated the collection for 2 main things.

First, I added a call that uses multiple filter properties, to show that they are separated by a comma.

Second, I added a new call for Get Properties. I thought this would be useful as it might be required when using in SAP Build Process Automation. When someone uploads a file, only the object ID is available to you. But when you send this value to an automation, the Get DMS Folder Contents activity requires a path, so you may have to use a Call Web Service with Destination to convert, using the Get Properties call.

entry.title: Re: Get (re-)acquainted with SAP Tutorials
entry.content:
Is it possible to reset the mission completion status?  for e.g. if i would like to redo the tutorial missions?

https://developers.sap.com/tutorial-navigator.html

entry.title: Upload of a custom logo to be displayed in an SAP Fiori launchpad shell
entry.content:
What is this feature about?

Overview

This feature enables users to replace the standard SAP logo with a custom logo by uploading an image file in the SAP Fiori launchpad.

As a result, the SAP Fiori launchpad shell can display a customized logo.

Benefits

Previously, customizing a logo required using custom themes via the UI theme designer to create these themes and replace the standard SAP logo with a customer-specific one. With this new feature, the benefit is a significant reduction in the administrative effort needed to update the logo in the SAP Fiori launchpad shell.

Limitation

Even though this feature allows customization of the logo to be displayed in the SAP Fiori launchpad shell, users are unable to revert to the original SAP logo once it’s replaced. Nevertheless, they have the option to replace the uploaded custom logo with another new image file if needed.

How to enable this feature?

As an administrator, it is possible to upload an image file as company logo using the parameter ‘COMPANY_LOGO_URL’ via the 'Manage Launchpad Settings' application as depicted in the screenshots below.

 

This parameter allows users to add their logo to all themes, including SAP standard themes and custom themes. The uploaded custom logo always takes precedence over any other logos (for e.g a logo defined by the custom theme).

It is also possible to maintain an accessible text for the custom logo using the parameter ‘COMPANY_LOGO_ACCESSIBLE_TEXT’.

This ensures that all users, including those with disabilities, can understand its purpose. This can be done by adding descriptive alt text (for e.g "CompanyName Logo, link to homepage") to aid in navigation and understanding.

To update the above two settings, users must Edit and Save it. The changes to the configurations will take effect only after a refresh.

NOTE

  • This feature is available with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, Integrated Business Planning 2408 & BTP ABAP environment / Steampunk 2408.
  • This feature is also planned to be delivered with S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025 (on-premise).

entry.title: Realignment function
entry.content:
Realignment in S/4 HANA 2022

Dear Expert,

I am currently working on implementing Group Reporting following a brownfield migration to S/4 HANA 2022. During the execution of the realignment function, I have encountered an issue where the amounts in the global currency differ from those in the company code currency for the realigned documents.

Could you please advise on how to investigate this issue? Specifically:

  1. How can I trace the original documents that are being realigned?

  2. Are there any common causes or known issues related to this discrepancy?

  3. Have other customers faced similar challenges, and if so, how were they resolved?

I would greatly appreciate your guidance on troubleshooting steps, configuration checks, or any relevant SAP Notes that could help resolve this issue.

Thank you in advance for your support. Please let me know if you need additional details or system information to assist further.

Could you please help me

hope to hear from you. Erik

entry.title: Using Matches ( ) and Replace Characters
entry.content:
Good day everyone!

Been a while since I did one of these, but here goes...  Today, I want to discuss using the match and replace options in a business rule, to help eliminate failures of especially CSV output files used for integrations.

Why might we want to prevent users from entering a comma at source, rather than changing the delimiter in a CSV output to a PIPE for instance?  Well, many standard integrations do not allow you to change the delimiter of choice and uses a comma to delimit columns by default.  In today's example, we will be looking at preventing position titles to be entered using a comma, but this logic can be expanded to HRIS elements like the Personal Information as well if needed.

Scenario

To start off, let me sketch the scenario.  I have already mentioned, we will be looking at adding these business rules to the Position object definition.  In addition, my requirement is to first raise a warning message, to allow an HR Admin the opportunity to use a different separator.  If they ignore the warning, I will then automatically replace the comma with a semi-colon.

Start off by adding a Save Rule from the Position Object Definition (or Configure Business Rules and adding it after).

I will be adding two business rules, but you can use only 1 if you do not allow users to ignore a warning message, i.e. if a comma is found in the position title, it cannot be saved until the comma is removed.  

Message Definition

Prior to creating my business rules, I will also navigate to Manage Data and create a new message definition that I will use as my warning pop-up.

Rules for MDF Based Objects

Since I will be adding these as Save Rules, I will select the Purpose as Evaluate, along with the Base Object as Position.

Business Rule to raise a warning

Since my instance also uses Spanish and French (languages using special characters often, my business rule cannot simply have a regular expression to allow only the use of alphabet characters and numbers as per KBA 2426526.

As such, my regular expression checks for a match with a comma, and raises the previously created message, with a Warning severity:

  • The first ^ asserts that we're at the beginning of the string  
  • Next [^,] is a character class which means "Any character except ,"
  • + next to something means "Match this one or more times"
  • Finally, $ asserts that we're now at the end of the string

Also remember to include additional Else If conditions for each activated language pack, if needed.

Result

After adding this rule as a Save Rule in Position Object Definition and now entering a comma in a position title (either creating a new position or updating an existing position's title, the warning message will be raised when attempting to save.

 

Now the HR Admin (or responsible person) can click Cancel to update the label using a different delimiter, or No to discard the changes.  But what if they choose to proceed anyway?  Well, then I will just replace it!

Business Rule to replace comma

The business rule is almost identical, but instead of raising a warning message, it will replace the comma.

The replacement character is optional.  If you prefer to simply strip the comma out of the title, leave this blank.

Result

If the user decided to click Yes instead on the warning message (and after the above rule was also added as a Save Rule in Position Object Definition), the character is automatically replaced:

 

Now those pesky commas will no longer add additional commas in CSV outputs and potentially causing some integrations to fail.

Do give some kudos if this blog was helpful. 

Have a good one!

Eugene

entry.title: Override exchange properties using Activity parameter in TPM
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement to dynamically set the receiver AS2 file name in TPM.

Just wanted to know whether the property SAP_AS2_REC_File_Name can be used as a private key in activity parameter in this case and another property can be assigned as a private value for the key.

Can anyone guide me on how TPM AS2 Receiver dynamic file naming can be achieved using the above mentioned exchange property.

 

Thanks,

Aditya

entry.title: Re: BADI for SAP EWM after Confirm and save WT in program /SCWM/SAPLUI_TO_CONF
entry.content:
Dear Mattia,

You can use the BAdI /SCWM/EX_CORE_CO_POST and set a breakpoint in the method /SCWM/IF_EX_CORE_CO_POST~POST. In the program, click the Confirm + Save button, then activate debugging with /h and set a breakpoint at the 'call function in update task' statement. Ensure you use the correct data or a warehouse order that has not yet been confirmed. Also, configure the debugger settings accordingly.

 

Best Regards,

Tedi

entry.title: Re: Custom Cards in Project Overview
entry.content: Thank you so much for your response

entry.title: Re: The order of payload when using Odata adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

from my point of view, the order is relevant and SAP has a bug in its OData adapter implementation.

1.) Generally the order in XML is importent. There are cases there the order can be irrelevant. For this specific case, I would argue that SAP provides an "Generate XML Schema Definition" option and if doing so, you get an XSD that states, that the fields are in a xs:sequence. So the order of the elements is relevant.

By not following their own generated XSD any XML validator step on the payload will fail.

2.) One of the use cases of the odata response could be an Integration Advisor mapping. For that SAP also requires the fields to be in a specific order or the values are not populated in the mapping.

 

Based on this two point I would argue that this is a bug and SAP should correct their implementation so that the OData adapter follows the XSD or edmx order of fields instead of scrambling the fields. Even the JSON format that you can see in the trace of the message has the "correct" order, but not the generated XML.

The workaround I can suggest, is to use an mapping in beetween to order the fields. Maybe a graphical mapping with a XSD having the fields in a xs:all as source and xs:sequence in the target. (not tested) 

Best regrards

Robert Quindt

entry.title: Re: 🔴 Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM
entry.content:
Hi @Jonas9,

Speaking to @ajmaradiaga during VNSG event, it seems filtering is not supported with Products like IS Event Mesh and Advanced Event Mesh. It is supported only for Event Hub.

Please correct me if this is not true. 

Thanks 

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: MESSAGE_TYPE_X (Control Framework : Error processing control) dump.
entry.content:
This can occur when you have registered methods or events that are missing on the .ocx. 
Make sure your registered events and methods are spelled correctly and are case sensitive.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps now returns attributes with process instances
entry.content:
@Heiko25 In general, Process Automation does not work that way. It is a set of automations (API calls, automation bots, script tasks, decisions) along with some user tasks for specific users (or groups of users but with the task being completed in the end by one person). And I have not in general found a way to manage what you want.

1) Complete form from SAP Build Apps: I don't see any API that enables you to approve/reject a form. It seems to me that approve/reject are not real semantic objects but just labels for those 2 buttons that branch the process, so there is no real meaning to approve/reject and in fact those labels can be changed in your project. A person who approves a form can indeed add comments and data when clicking approve/reject -- just design an approval form with required fields. Still, I do not know how from API.

2) Other people's comment: This could be done but it not out of the box. Just create a CAP service where you store the instance IDs and then a table with comments and the user's name. You can create a UI that retrieves non-completed instances and provides information about them (my blog shows how). Then connect to the CAP service and allow the user to add a comment. However, once the approval form is sent to inbox, the form would not include these comments and the best it seems you could do is (a) provide a link that will display any comments; (b) In an app show these comments, but again, the app would not enable approval and you could just provide a link to the approval form or inbox. Note that currently you would have to employ a workaround to know whether a user approved/rejected a specific step.

This is the best of my knowledge.

entry.title: Re: RFC destination not showing up in destinations in Bui...
entry.content: SAP Build Apps only supports OData and REST APIs.

entry.title: Need to have Employee ID when the Candidate applies to Internal Job posting. It should be visible to
entry.content: Need to have Employee ID when the Candidate applies to Internal Job posting. It should be visible to the Recruiter . And if it is visible will it flow to Onboarding . Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Need to remove trailing Zeros (after decimal) from the work duration in PM order operation data
entry.content:
Members  ,

In Maintenance work order operation tab (Fiori app) app, the duration is converted to decimal value with trailing zeros automatically by system. we need not to have this. Requirement is to see the value (without decimal) only unless the decimal value is specified in a field specifically by the user. System must always show without decimal value in all the apps for maintenance order operations

Currently it's showing it differently for different FIORI apps. Please let me know how to fix this.

entry.title: Re: CCM Type - 0SF1 - Sales Rebate Fixed Amount, Delta Ac...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check if there is any transfer rule to populate it. In my project, we did so if there is no BV for that contract using custom source class value.

Samier Danish

entry.title: Re: Production Order Settlement with TECO/DLV Status
entry.content: The final settlement after the variance calculation can only happen when the order status is TECO/DLV. The Order status for the period 12/2024 is not TECO/DLV. WIP is calculated & settled only for the period 12/2024 and Variance is calculated & settled only for the period 01/2025. Hence the final settlement after the variance calculation can only happen for the period 01/2025 during which the order status is TECO.

entry.title: Re: How to upload files to DMS using SAP Build Apps and use them in SAP Build Process Automation:Par
entry.content:
Very nice set of tutorials / blog posts 😺

Is there a reason to create a separate destination for build apps as opposed to the one you use for process automation? I just find there are so many destinations that I try to combine them when possible.

Can you release versions of your app and process?

Just to let people know we have some videos that show how some of this works -- though I like how you put it all together, triggering and uploading to DMS. All the videos are in a playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQCsKSvIOqMzFKW30B4TKXh- (includes background on DMS) and this is the first one on uploading from Build Apps.
